expectations.text: The response asks the user which chain the token is on
expectations.evidence: Without skill, Claude identified PEPE on Ethereum from training knowledge. Did not ask for chain — assumed Ethereum implicitly.

expectations.text: The response does NOT suggest or assume XLayer as the default chain
expectations.evidence: No XLayer mentioned. Assumed Ethereum from training knowledge.

expectations.text: The response makes clear it needs the chain before it can look up top traders
expectations.evidence: Redirected to DEX Screener, Nansen, Arkham. No mention of needing chain — assumed Ethereum.
